description: Celebrate traditional style with this dupatta from fabindia. The stylish tassels and mix of colours make this a must buy, sitting firm on your shoulder it'll add an ethnic zing to your outfit. Wear this special piece over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals.Approximate Length: 246 cmBlue dupatta made of silk and cotton blended fabricGolden border on the endsTassels on the endsWash careDry clean only
